summary: Very good recording of an energetic show featuring standout performances of Shakedown Street, Samson and Brother Esau
review: The three fan reviews praise the concert’s high energy, noting a rocking first set that opens with Shakedown Street and Samson and delivers a memorable take on Brother Esau. While no technical details are given, listeners describe the sound as very good, making the show enjoyable despite the lack of specific recording information.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently positive comments about both performance and overall sound quality; limited technical detail lowers confidence slightly.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers call the audio "very good" and "also very good" but give no specifics about mix, clarity, or source type.

standout_songs: Eyes of the World > Man Smart
show_quality.setlist_flow: First set opens strong with Shakedown Street and Samson, keeping a rocking vibe throughout; jam sections (e.g., Eyes of the World into unexpected segues) add surprise and excitement.
